title: Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture

Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture

Printmaking Studio

MENU

Printmaking Studio

In our printmaking studio, which is actively used in all
fashion and print design courses, our faculty's professional printing
technician makes the template patterns of the patterns designed by our students
and supports our students in printing applications. In our workshop, which is
suitable for screen printing applications of quantities and panel patterns, it
is ensured that student designs are printed and developed on the textile
surface with all technical problems solved. In this way, our students develop
their knowledge and skills in pattern design and printing applications.
